description: Sector overlay for airlines, aviation operators, airports, ground handlers, maintenance organizations, aviation training, and aviation service providers in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Aviation. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Ghana Civil Aviation Act, 2004 (Act 678) / GCAA mandate
Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 (Act 1038)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Cyber Security Authority

rules.title: GCAA licence, certificate, permit, or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for GCAA licence, air operator certificate, aerodrome certificate, permit, approval, or aviation authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Aviation safety management or operational safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety management system, hazard identification, operational procedure, airworthiness, maintenance, or flight safety evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Air navigation, communication, or aerodrome procedure evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for air navigation service, radio communication, ATS, aerodrome operation, or search-and-rescue evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Passenger, crew, or traveller personal-data handling evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for privacy, passenger-data, crew-data, booking-data, or data protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
